case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION; $16,300.00 U.S. C et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $8,150.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTY V ROY LEFCOURT ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT DAVID T HORAN UPONS PAYMENT OF $US CURRENCY TO THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT, SAID PAYMENT BE MADE BY CASHIER'S CHECK MADE PAYABLE TO THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTEMENT. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT SAID PAYMENT OF $US CURRENCY, REFERENCED IN THE ABOVE PARAGRAH, $8,150.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PUR TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION TO JUDGMNT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SEC 1536 & ORDER TO DEPOSIT MONEY FILED BY PLTF
ORDER TO PAYOUT MONEY FILED BY PETITIONER
